name: GOLFTEC Little Rock
address: 17801 Chenal Pkwy Suite B & C, Little Rock, AR 72223
about: GOLFTEC Little Rock is a golf training studio specializing in data-driven instruction using advanced technology. The facility offers golf lessons, club fitting, and practice sessions utilizing OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed feedback on swings. Services are delivered by PGA-certified coaches who create personalized improvement plans. The studio operates on a membership and lesson package model, with pricing based on individual services or multi-lesson plans, and is designed for golfers focused on measurable improvement rather than casual play.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
PGA-certified coaches providing personalized, data-driven lesson plans
One-time pause option for lesson packs with up to 60 days of flexibility

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors mentioned, specifically referenced as SKYTRAK products and used for club fitting and lessons.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own clubs for lessons and practice sessions. The facility does not mention club rentals as a standard amenity.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention food or drink service, so it is unclear if you can bring your own. No BYOB policy is specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Not applicable. GOLFTEC Little Rock is a training studio focused on lessons and practice, not a traditional simulator venue for playing full rounds of golf.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, making it a suitable environment for younger golfers looking to improve their skills with professional coaching.
